parameters.content:
## Sogni LLM Artist Poem Emailer

Generate a short rhyming witty poem about a named artist with Sogni LLM, then email it out.

### Setup
1. Install `n8n-nodes-sogni`
2. Add Sogni credentials
3. Add SMTP credentials to `Send Email`
4. Update the `fromEmail` and `toEmail` placeholders
5. Open the form URL from `Ask For Artist Name`
6. Submit an artist name to run the workflow

### Notes
- This workflow picks the available chat model with the most workers
- It asks for an artist name first, then uses that in the poem prompt
- Update the prompt in `Select Chat Model + Prompt` if you want a different rhyme style

parameters.formDescription: Enter an artist name and Sogni LLM will write a short witty rhyming poem, then email it to you.

nodes.name: Ask For Artist Name
nodes.notes: Submit the form with an artist name to trigger the poem email workflow

nodes.name: Get All LLM Models
nodes.notes: Fetches currently available Sogni chat models

nodes.name: Select Chat Model + Prompt
nodes.notes: Chooses the chat model with the most workers and prepares the poem prompt

nodes.name: Write Artist Poem
nodes.notes: Generates the poem with the selected Sogni LLM model

nodes.name: Format Email
nodes.notes: Formats the generated poem as HTML for email delivery

nodes.name: Send Email
nodes.notes: Requires SMTP credentials and sends the poem to your inbox
